requests.event: US CPI for June 2026 was materially softer than expected; headline CPI was 3.5% y/y versus 3.8% consensus and -0.4% m/m, while core CPI was 2.6% y/y and 0.0% m/m. The dollar and US Treasury yields fell after the release.
requests.policy: Close the existing EUR/USD short at the next available completed 5-minute bar. Do not reverse to long and do not reopen during the same week.
